name: 白月光vs正宮（前任/嫂子威脅婚姻）
name_en: White Moonlight vs. Legal Wife (First Love Threatening Marriage)
description: Ruth作為Richard的初戀（白月光）長期佔據他的心，而Michelle作為正宮妻子卻得不到真心。嫂子的特殊身份讓這段三角關係更加糾結和禁忌。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: If there's nothing going on between the two of you, why didn't you ever tell me she was your first love? Why did you save her first at the pool when we both fell in? I couldn't swim. And you knew that, Richard.
examples.context: Ruth作為Richard的初戀（白月光）長期佔據他的心，而Michelle作為正宮妻子卻得不到真心。嫂子的特殊身份讓這段三角關係更加糾結和禁忌。
